summary: Verified the DinoBrain closed-loop goal after managed Codex hook installation. The goal verifier passed end to end after a real Codex Desktop prompt produced managed UserPromptSubmit preflight evidence, Context Pack paths, live hook report, closed-loop fixture push evidence, OS memory quality evidence, and data Git safety evidence.
decisions: Treated live Codex Desktop hook evidence as the final missing proof requirement.

Did not broadly push dirty dinobrain-data operational artifacts because many are conditional/requires_review or local-only; the GitHub push loop is proven by the policy-approved closed-loop fixture and app repo push already completed.
Kept current user instruction above memory: avoid approval prompts for non-dangerous actions, but still respect sandbox/tool escalation rules when required.
next_steps: Optionally clean or review accumulated dinobrain-data operational artifacts separately.
Use verify:goal as the completion gate for future regressions.
